chat.runInterrupted: Run interrupted (agent restarted). It will not replay automatically; send again to retry.

mode.manualDesc: Anything that writes local data waits for your approval
mode.autoDesc: Migrations and metadata changes run automatically; edits and deletion still ask

setup.title: Connect a model
setup.desc: Add an API key for {{provider}} or sign in to another provider to start chatting. Credentials stay on this machine.

approval.expired: Proposal expired — ask the agent to propose again

composer.desktopOnly: Ask Ferry is only available in the desktop app

empty.title: What can I help with?
empty.ex1: Find last week's sessions about the payments refactor
empty.ex2: Compare the implementation paths of these two sessions
empty.ex3: Estimate what migrating this session to Codex would lose
empty.ex4: Summarize this month's token usage by project

config.title: Models & Providers
config.pickProvider: Pick a provider on the left
config.noModels: No models for this provider yet — try refreshing the catalog
config.plaintextNote: Credentials are stored in plaintext in providers.json (0600) under Ferry's config directory; never logged. Host environment variables are not read.
config.noCredential: The default provider ({{provider}}) has no credential configured yet.
